target.title: fix(doctor): diagnose malformed provider catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- moves malformed static provider catalog handling out of runtime projection and into `openclaw doctor`
- keeps unified text provider catalog projection on the typed provider catalog contract instead of carrying fallback/skip semantics in core runtime code
- adds the `core/doctor/provider-catalog-projection` health check for full provider registrations
- reports malformed provider containers, provider entries, model lists, unreadable rows, invalid model ids/names, and proxy/access errors from static catalog hooks

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt-file /tmp/provider-catalog-doctor-review-context.txt`

Known proof gap: a broader touched-file oxlint invocation crashed once inside `tsgolint` with a Go SIGSEGV. The smaller targeted lint slice above passed.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: malformed static provider catalog output is diagnosed by doctor instead of adding runtime fallback/tolerance to unified text provider catalog projection.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on branch head `147b44d0984b9c7e868e681e4119bf54233fd387`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused Vitest suites for doctor health checks, doctor contributions, conversion-plan wiring, and provider-entry projection coverage; ran formatter, targeted lint, diff whitespace check, and autoreview.

Evidence after fix: tests cover full provider registrations, invalid provider containers, invalid or missing `models`, unreadable provider/model rows, invalid model ids/names, revoked proxy handling, static catalog hook failures, and doctor contribution rendering.

Observed result after fix: `openclaw doctor` health check paths report actionable malformed provider catalog findings while runtime projection keeps the typed provider catalog contract.

What was not tested: no live provider/network catalog calls; scoped to static provider catalog validation.
target.author: vincentkoc
